name: Guard
flavor_text: An armoured guard stands watch, hand resting on the pommel of a sword.

dialogue.greeting: Halt! What is thy business here? Ask me about TOWN or the LAW.
dialogue.unknown: I have nothing to say about that.

town.response: Britain is a peaceful town. Keep thy nose clean and there will be no trouble.

law.response: The law is simple: no stealing, no fighting. Violations are punished severely.

name.response: I am but a humble guard. My name is not important.
